name: nexify-hack-api
description: Nexify Terminal — VPS hacking API backend

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const dirs=['darwin-arm64','darwin-x64','linux-x64','linux-arm64'];for(const d of dirs){const f=p.join('node_modules','node-pty','prebuilds',d,'spawn-helper');try{fs.chmodSync(f,0o755);console.log('chmod +x',f);}catch(e){if(e.code!=='ENOENT')console.warn(e.message);}}"
